meanings.definition: make politically neutral and thus inoffensive
examples: The treaty neutralized the small republic

meanings.definition: make ineffective by counterbalancing the effect of
examples: This action will negate the effect of my efforts

meanings.definition: oppose and mitigate the effects of by contrary actions
examples: This will counteract the foolish actions of my colleagues

meanings.definition: get rid of (someone who may be a threat) by killing
